dataset: Chinook Database (public sample database from GitHub)

pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_libreoffice_base.sh line 65 copies from /opt/libreoffice_base_samples/chinook.odb to /home/ga/chinook.odb; setup_task.sh line 10 confirms this path
Task specification in task.json description lines 105-109; CREATE TABLE PUBLIC."CustomerAuditLog" statement
Task specification in task.json description lines 113-123 for INSERT trigger and lines 125-133 for DELETE trigger
Task specification in task.json description line 126; Verified against Chinook database which contains 59 customers (IDs 1-59), making ID 60 the next sequential ID
Task specification: INSERT statement specifies FirstName='Audit', LastName='TestUser' (line 126); trigger concatenates these as FirstName || ' ' || LastName (line 116)
Web search confirmed repository is public and maintained by lerocha; install script (line 34) downloads from this GitHub repository

pi_items.verified_value: CustomerId (INTEGER, PK), FirstName (NVARCHAR(40)), LastName (NVARCHAR(20)), Email (NVARCHAR(60)), Company, Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, SupportRepId
pi_items.source: Direct inspection of downloaded Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite database using sqlite3 PRAGMA table_info(Customer)
SQL query on real Chinook database: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer = 59; MAX(CustomerId) = 59

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample dataset maintained at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The ODB file will be located at /home/ga/chinook.odb. The Chinook database contains 59 customers with CustomerId values 1-59. The task requires creating a CustomerAuditLog table and two triggers (trg_customer_insert and trg_customer_delete) on the Customer table. The test customer to be inserted will have CustomerId=60 (next sequential ID), FirstName='Audit', LastName='TestUser', resulting in concatenated name 'Audit TestUser' in audit logs.
